diagrams.title: ARM Exception Vector Table
diagrams.description: Shows the memory layout of exception vectors from 0x00 to 0x1C
diagrams.purpose: Learn the exact addresses and order of exception vectors in ARM architecture

diagrams.title: ARM Processor Modes and Transitions
diagrams.description: Shows all 7 modes and how they transition to each other
elements: FIQ, IRQ, Supervisor, Abort, Undefined, System (privileged)
diagrams.purpose: Understand mode organization and transitions in ARM processor

diagrams.title: CPSR Register Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the bit fields of Current Program Status Register
elements: N(31), Z(30), C(29), V(28) - condition flags
diagrams.purpose: Learn CPSR bit positions and their functions for exception/interrupt control

diagrams.title: Exception Handling Sequence
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing steps when exception occurs
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete exception handling flow in ARM
